---
title: "enzyme_specific_pectin_deg"
author: "Lasse Steffensen"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

setwd("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/01_05/SBP_deg")

library(tidyverse)
library(ggtext)

# Gene list
gene_list <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/df/26/pectin_deg_genes.tsv",
  header = TRUE, sep = "\t"
)


# Name map
name_map <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/01_05/module_completeness/name_map.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")


# Tax files
GTDB_MiDAS_tax <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/01_05_cor/write_files/GTDB_MiDAS_tax.tsv", sep="\t", header=TRUE) %>%
  select(-domain, -phylum, -class, -order, -family, -genus, -species)

meso_tax <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/01_05_cor/write_files/05/meso_mags_tax.tsv", sep="\t", header=TRUE) %>%
  left_join(name_map, by = c("Genome" = "old")) %>%
  left_join(GTDB_MiDAS_tax, by = c("Genome" = "FLASV"))

thermo_tax <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/01_05_cor/write_files/05/thermo_mags_tax.tsv", sep="\t", header=TRUE) %>%
  left_join(name_map, by = c("Genome" = "old")) %>%
  left_join(GTDB_MiDAS_tax, by = c("Genome" = "FLASV"))


# KO x genome matrix
ko_genome_matrix <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/df/26/ko_genome_matrix.tsv", sep="\t", header=TRUE)

ko_genome_matrix_meso <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/df/26/ko_genome_matrix.tsv", sep="\t", header=TRUE) %>% 
  select(KO, any_of(meso_tax$Genome))

ko_genome_matrix_thermo <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/25/df/26/ko_genome_matrix.tsv", sep="\t", header=TRUE) %>% 
  select(KO, any_of(thermo_tax$Genome))





```


```{r}

# Filter for target KOs
KOs <- na.omit(gene_list$KO)

ko_genome_matrix_meso_f <- ko_genome_matrix_meso %>%
  filter(KO %in% KOs)

ko_genome_matrix_thermo_f <- ko_genome_matrix_thermo %>%
  filter(KO %in% KOs)


# Renew naming of genomes using name_map, also remove all-zero columns
rename_vec <- setNames(name_map$new, name_map$old)

ko_genome_matrix_meso_renamed <- ko_genome_matrix_meso_f %>%
  rename_with(
    .cols = -KO,
    .fn   = ~ ifelse(.x %in% names(rename_vec), rename_vec[.x], .x)
  ) %>%
  select(KO, where(~ any(. != 0)))

ko_genome_matrix_thermo_renamed <- ko_genome_matrix_thermo_f %>%
  rename_with(
    .cols = -KO,
    .fn   = ~ ifelse(.x %in% names(rename_vec), rename_vec[.x], .x)
  ) %>%
  select(KO, where(~ any(. != 0)))


# "Flip" matrix to introduce new variables to genomes and join tax info onto (incl. rel_abun)
ko_genome_matrix_meso_t <- ko_genome_matrix_meso_renamed %>%
  column_to_rownames("KO") %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("genome") %>%
  left_join(meso_tax, by = c("genome" = "new"))

ko_genome_matrix_thermo_t <- ko_genome_matrix_thermo_renamed %>%
  column_to_rownames("KO") %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("genome") %>%
  left_join(thermo_tax, by = c("genome" = "new"))




```


................................................................................
                                Tile maps
................................................................................


Meso_x (rel abun collapsed to KO)
```{r}

ko_genome_matrix_meso_tax <- ko_genome_matrix_meso_t %>%
  mutate(s = if_else(is.na(s), paste0(g, "_sp"), s)) %>%
  mutate(genome = paste(s, genome, sep = " / "))

# 1) KO metadata with duplicates preserved, keep gene_list order, and give each row a unique plotting ID
ko_meta <- gene_list %>%
  filter(!is.na(KO)) %>%
  transmute(
    KO     = as.character(KO),
    class  = as.character(class),
    enzyme = as.character(enzyme),   # subclass
    EC     = as.character(EC)
  ) %>%
  filter(KO %in% KOs) %>%
  mutate(
    KO_label = KO,
    KO_id    = make.unique(KO_label),
    gl_i     = row_number()
  )

# 2) Matrix to long
mat_long <- ko_genome_matrix_meso_tax %>%
  select(genome, rel_abun, any_of(unique(KOs))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(genome, rel_abun),
    names_to = "KO",
    values_to = "presence"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    KO = as.character(KO),
    presence = as.integer(presence > 0)
  )

# 3) Replicate each KO column into multiple KO instances
long <- mat_long %>%
  inner_join(ko_meta, by = "KO", relationship = "many-to-many")

# 4) Order genomes by descending rel_abun + labels
genome_order <- long %>%
  distinct(genome, rel_abun) %>%
  arrange(desc(rel_abun)) %>%
  pull(genome)

y_labs <- long %>%
  distinct(genome, rel_abun) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(genome, " (", sprintf("%.2f", rel_abun), "%)"))

long <- long %>%
  mutate(genome = factor(genome, levels = genome_order))

# KO layout
ko_layout <- long %>%
  distinct(class, enzyme, KO, KO_id, KO_label, EC, gl_i) %>%
  arrange(class, gl_i, KO_id) %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  mutate(x_local = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

class_sizes <- ko_layout %>%
  count(class, name = "n_kos") %>%
  arrange(class) %>%
  mutate(offset = lag(cumsum(n_kos + 2), default = 0))

ko_layout <- ko_layout %>%
  left_join(class_sizes, by = "class") %>%
  mutate(x = offset + x_local)

# Subclass separators
sub_sep <- ko_layout %>%
  group_by(class, enzyme) %>%
  summarise(x_end = max(x), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  arrange(x_end, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(-n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(x_sep = x_end + 0.5)

# Attach x to plotting data
long <- long %>%
  left_join(
    ko_layout %>% select(class, enzyme, KO, KO_id, x),
    by = c("class", "enzyme", "KO", "KO_id")
  )

# Sum rel_abun per KO (each genome counted once per KO)
ko_rel_abun <- long %>%
  group_by(genome, KO) %>%
  summarise(
    rel_abun = first(rel_abun),
    has_ko = any(presence == 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(has_ko) %>%
  group_by(KO) %>%
  summarise(ko_rel_abun = sum(rel_abun), .groups = "drop")

# Axis labels with KO-level summed rel_abun (2 decimals + %)
axis_df <- ko_layout %>%
  distinct(x, KO_label, KO, enzyme) %>%
  left_join(ko_rel_abun, by = "KO") %>%
  mutate(ko_rel_abun = replace_na(ko_rel_abun, 0)) %>%
  arrange(x) %>%
  mutate(
    axis_label = paste0(
  "<b>", enzyme, "</b>",
  "<br><span style='font-size:10pt; line-height:1.2;'>", KO, "</span>",
  "<br><span style='font-size:10pt; line-height:1.2;'>&Sigma; rel. abun. = ", 
  sprintf("%.2f%%", ko_rel_abun), "</span>"
)
  )

p <- ggplot(long, aes(x = x, y = genome, fill = presence)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(
    data = sub_sep,
    aes(xintercept = x_sep),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    colour = "grey75"
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ class, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = axis_df$x,
    labels = axis_df$axis_label,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = setNames(y_labs$label, y_labs$genome)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey90", high = "black", breaks = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Gene (KO)", y = "Species (rel. abun. %)", fill = "Presence") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.x.bottom = ggtext::element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 11),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 11),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey98", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "grey60", linewidth = 0.9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = "grey60"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


ggsave(filename = "pectin_EC/meso.png", plot = p,
       width = 21, height = 12, dpi = 300)

```

Thermo_x (rel abun collapsed to KO)
```{r}

# PME = "Pectin methyl esterase"
# PG = "Endopolygalacturonase", "Exopolygalacturonase"
# PL = "Endopectate lyase", "Exopectate lyase"
# PNL = "Endopectin lyase"
# PME = Pectin methyl esterase"
# endo-Gal = "Endo (1,4) galactanase", "Endo (1,6) galactanase", "Endo (1,3) galactanase"
# β-Gal = "β-galactosidase"
# endo-A = "Endoarabinase"
# AF = "α-L arabinofuranosidase"
# RgH = "Rhamnogalacturonan hydrolase", "Rhamnogalacturonan rhamnohydrolase", "Rhamnogalacturonan galacturonohydrolase"
# RgL = "Rhamnogalacturonan endolyase", "Rhamnogalacturonan exolyase"

ko_genome_matrix_thermo_tax <- ko_genome_matrix_thermo_t %>%
  mutate(s = if_else(is.na(s), paste0(g, "_sp"), s)) %>%
  mutate(genome = paste(s, genome, sep = " / "))

# 1) KO metadata with duplicates preserved, keep gene_list order, and give each row a unique plotting ID
ko_meta <- gene_list %>%
  filter(!is.na(KO)) %>%
  transmute(
    KO     = as.character(KO),
    class  = as.character(class),
    enzyme = as.character(enzyme),   # subclass
    EC     = as.character(EC)
  ) %>%
  filter(KO %in% KOs) %>%
  mutate(
    KO_label = KO,
    KO_id    = make.unique(KO_label),
    gl_i     = row_number()
  )

# 2) Matrix to long
mat_long <- ko_genome_matrix_thermo_tax %>%
  select(genome, rel_abun, any_of(unique(KOs))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(genome, rel_abun),
    names_to = "KO",
    values_to = "presence"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    KO = as.character(KO),
    presence = as.integer(presence > 0)
  )

# 3) Replicate each KO column into multiple KO instances
long <- mat_long %>%
  inner_join(ko_meta, by = "KO", relationship = "many-to-many")

# 4) Order genomes by descending rel_abun + labels
genome_order <- long %>%
  distinct(genome, rel_abun) %>%
  arrange(desc(rel_abun)) %>%
  pull(genome)

y_labs <- long %>%
  distinct(genome, rel_abun) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(genome, " (", sprintf("%.2f", rel_abun), "%)"))

long <- long %>%
  mutate(genome = factor(genome, levels = genome_order))

# KO layout
ko_layout <- long %>%
  distinct(class, enzyme, KO, KO_id, KO_label, EC, gl_i) %>%
  arrange(class, gl_i, KO_id) %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  mutate(x_local = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

class_sizes <- ko_layout %>%
  count(class, name = "n_kos") %>%
  arrange(class) %>%
  mutate(offset = lag(cumsum(n_kos + 2), default = 0))

ko_layout <- ko_layout %>%
  left_join(class_sizes, by = "class") %>%
  mutate(x = offset + x_local)

# Subclass separators
sub_sep <- ko_layout %>%
  group_by(class, enzyme) %>%
  summarise(x_end = max(x), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  arrange(x_end, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(-n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(x_sep = x_end + 0.5)

# Attach x to plotting data
long <- long %>%
  left_join(
    ko_layout %>% select(class, enzyme, KO, KO_id, x),
    by = c("class", "enzyme", "KO", "KO_id")
  )

# Sum rel_abun per KO (each genome counted once per KO)
ko_rel_abun <- long %>%
  group_by(genome, KO) %>%
  summarise(
    rel_abun = first(rel_abun),
    has_ko = any(presence == 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(has_ko) %>%
  group_by(KO) %>%
  summarise(ko_rel_abun = sum(rel_abun), .groups = "drop")

# Axis labels with KO-level summed rel_abun (2 decimals + %)
axis_df <- ko_layout %>%
  distinct(x, KO_label, KO, enzyme) %>%
  left_join(ko_rel_abun, by = "KO") %>%
  mutate(ko_rel_abun = replace_na(ko_rel_abun, 0)) %>%
  arrange(x) %>%
  mutate(
    axis_label = paste0(
  "<b>", enzyme, "</b>",
  "<br><span style='font-size:10pt; line-height:1.2;'>", KO, "</span>",
  "<br><span style='font-size:10pt; line-height:1.2;'>&Sigma; rel. abun. = ", 
  sprintf("%.2f%%", ko_rel_abun), "</span>"
)
  )

p <- ggplot(long, aes(x = x, y = genome, fill = presence)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(
    data = sub_sep,
    aes(xintercept = x_sep),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    colour = "grey75"
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ class, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = axis_df$x,
    labels = axis_df$axis_label,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = setNames(y_labs$label, y_labs$genome)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey90", high = "black", breaks = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Gene (KO)", y = "Species (rel. abun. %)", fill = "Presence") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.x.bottom = ggtext::element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 10),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 11),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey98", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "grey60", linewidth = 0.9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = "grey60"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


ggsave(filename = "pectin_EC/thermo.png", plot = p,
       width = 21, height = 8, dpi = 300)



```




W. colour

Thermo
```{r}

# PME = "Pectin methyl esterase"
# PG = "Endopolygalacturonase", "Exopolygalacturonase"
# PL = "Endopectate lyase", "Exopectate lyase"
# PNL = "Endopectin lyase"
# endo-Gal = "Endo (1,4) galactanase", "Endo (1,6) galactanase", "Endo (1,3) galactanase"
# β-Gal = "β-galactosidase"
# endo-A = "Endoarabinase"
# AF = "α-L arabinofuranosidase"
# RgH = "Rhamnogalacturonan hydrolase", "Rhamnogalacturonan rhamnohydrolase", "Rhamnogalacturonan galacturonohydrolase"
# RgL = "Rhamnogalacturonan endolyase", "Rhamnogalacturonan exolyase"

ko_genome_matrix_thermo_tax <- ko_genome_matrix_thermo_t %>%
  mutate(s = if_else(is.na(s), paste0(g, "_sp"), s)) %>%
  mutate(genome = paste(s, genome, sep = " / "))

# 1) KO metadata with duplicates preserved, keep gene_list order, and give each row a unique plotting ID
ko_meta <- gene_list %>%
  filter(!is.na(KO)) %>%
  transmute(
    KO     = as.character(KO),
    class  = as.character(class),
    enzyme = as.character(enzyme),
    EC     = as.character(EC)
  ) %>%
  filter(KO %in% KOs) %>%
  mutate(
    enzyme_group = case_when(
      enzyme %in% c("Pectin methyl esterase") ~ "PME",
      enzyme %in% c("Endopolygalacturonase", "Exopolygalacturonase") ~ "PG",
      enzyme %in% c("Endopectate lyase", "Exopectate lyase") ~ "PL",
      enzyme %in% c("Endopectin lyase") ~ "PNL",
      enzyme %in% c("Endo (1,4) galactanase", "Endo (1,6) galactanase", "Endo (1,3) galactanase") ~ "endo-Gal",
      enzyme %in% c("β-galactosidase") ~ "\u03b2-Gal",
      enzyme %in% c("Endoarabinanase") ~ "endo-A",
      enzyme %in% c("α-L arabinofuranosidase") ~ "AF",
      enzyme %in% c(
        "Rhamnogalacturonan hydrolase",
        "Rhamnogalacturonan rhamnohydrolase",
        "Rhamnogalacturonan galacturonohydrolase"
      ) ~ "RgH",
      enzyme %in% c(
        "Rhamnogalacturonan endolyase",
        "Rhamnogalacturonan exolyase"
      ) ~ "RgL",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    KO_label = KO,
    KO_id    = make.unique(KO_label),
    gl_i     = row_number()
  )

# Custom colours for enzyme groups
group_cols <- c(
  "PME"      = "#1B5E20",  # dark green
  "PG"       = "royalblue4",  # dark blue
  "PL"       = "red3",  # dark red
  "PNL"      = "slateblue",  # purple
  "endo-Gal" = "sienna1",  # orange-brown
  "\u03b2-Gal" = "#00838F",  # teal
  "endo-A"   = "#4E342E",  # brown
  "AF"       = "#AD1457",  # magenta
  "RgH"      = "#283593",  # indigo
  "RgL"      = "palegreen3",  # blue-grey
  "Other"    = "mediumorchid"   # dark grey
)

# 2) Matrix to long
mat_long <- ko_genome_matrix_thermo_tax %>%
  select(genome, rel_abun, any_of(unique(KOs))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(genome, rel_abun),
    names_to = "KO",
    values_to = "presence"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    KO = as.character(KO),
    presence = as.integer(presence > 0)
  )

# 3) Replicate each KO column into multiple KO instances
long <- mat_long %>%
  inner_join(ko_meta, by = "KO", relationship = "many-to-many")

# 4) Order genomes by descending rel_abun + labels
genome_order <- long %>%
  distinct(genome, rel_abun) %>%
  arrange(desc(rel_abun)) %>%
  pull(genome)

y_labs <- long %>%
  distinct(genome, rel_abun) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(genome, " (", sprintf("%.2f", rel_abun), "%)"))

long <- long %>%
  mutate(genome = factor(genome, levels = genome_order))

# KO layout
ko_layout <- long %>%
  distinct(class, enzyme, enzyme_group, KO, KO_id, KO_label, EC, gl_i) %>%
  arrange(class, gl_i, KO_id) %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  mutate(x_local = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

class_sizes <- ko_layout %>%
  count(class, name = "n_kos") %>%
  arrange(class) %>%
  mutate(offset = lag(cumsum(n_kos + 2), default = 0))

ko_layout <- ko_layout %>%
  left_join(class_sizes, by = "class") %>%
  mutate(x = offset + x_local)

# Subclass separators
sub_sep <- ko_layout %>%
  group_by(class, enzyme) %>%
  summarise(x_end = max(x), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  arrange(x_end, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(-n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(x_sep = x_end + 0.5)

# Attach x to plotting data
long <- long %>%
  left_join(
    ko_layout %>% select(class, enzyme, KO, KO_id, x),
    by = c("class", "enzyme", "KO", "KO_id")
  )

# Sum rel_abun per KO (each genome counted once per KO)
ko_rel_abun <- long %>%
  group_by(genome, KO) %>%
  summarise(
    rel_abun = first(rel_abun),
    has_ko = any(presence == 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(has_ko) %>%
  group_by(KO) %>%
  summarise(ko_rel_abun = sum(rel_abun), .groups = "drop")

# Axis labels with coloured enzyme names only
axis_df <- ko_layout %>%
  distinct(x, KO_label, KO, enzyme, enzyme_group) %>%
  left_join(ko_rel_abun, by = "KO") %>%
  mutate(
    ko_rel_abun = replace_na(ko_rel_abun, 0),
    enzyme_col = unname(group_cols[enzyme_group])
  ) %>%
  arrange(x) %>%
  mutate(
    axis_label = paste0(
      "<b><span style='color:", enzyme_col, ";'>", enzyme, "</span></b>",
      "<br><span style='font-size:10pt; line-height:1.2; color:black;'>", KO, "</span>",
      "<br><span style='font-size:10pt; line-height:1.2; color:black;'>&Sigma; rel. abun. = ",
      sprintf("%.2f%%", ko_rel_abun), "</span>"
    )
  )

p <- ggplot(long, aes(x = x, y = genome, fill = presence)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(
    data = sub_sep,
    aes(xintercept = x_sep),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    colour = "grey75"
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ class, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = axis_df$x,
    labels = axis_df$axis_label,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = setNames(y_labs$label, y_labs$genome)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey90", high = "black", breaks = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Gene (KO)", y = "Species (rel. abun. %)", fill = "Presence") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.x.bottom = ggtext::element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 10),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 11),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey98", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "grey60", linewidth = 0.9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = "grey60"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(filename = "pectin_EC/thermo_c.png", plot = p,
       width = 21, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

Meso
```{r}

# PME = "Pectin methyl esterase"
# PG = "Endopolygalacturonase", "Exopolygalacturonase"
# PL = "Endopectate lyase", "Exopectate lyase"
# PNL = "Endopectin lyase"
# endo-Gal = "Endo (1,4) galactanase", "Endo (1,6) galactanase", "Endo (1,3) galactanase"
# β-Gal = "β-galactosidase"
# endo-A = "Endoarabinase"
# AF = "α-L arabinofuranosidase"
# RgH = "Rhamnogalacturonan hydrolase", "Rhamnogalacturonan rhamnohydrolase", "Rhamnogalacturonan galacturonohydrolase"
# RgL = "Rhamnogalacturonan endolyase", "Rhamnogalacturonan exolyase"

ko_genome_matrix_meso_tax <- ko_genome_matrix_meso_t %>%
  mutate(s = if_else(is.na(s), paste0(g, "_sp"), s)) %>%
  mutate(genome = paste(s, genome, sep = " / "))

# 1) KO metadata with duplicates preserved, keep gene_list order, and give each row a unique plotting ID
ko_meta <- gene_list %>%
  filter(!is.na(KO)) %>%
  transmute(
    KO     = as.character(KO),
    class  = as.character(class),
    enzyme = as.character(enzyme),
    EC     = as.character(EC)
  ) %>%
  filter(KO %in% KOs) %>%
  mutate(
    enzyme_group = case_when(
      enzyme %in% c("Pectin methyl esterase") ~ "PME",
      enzyme %in% c("Endopolygalacturonase", "Exopolygalacturonase") ~ "PG",
      enzyme %in% c("Endopectate lyase", "Exopectate lyase") ~ "PL",
      enzyme %in% c("Endopectin lyase") ~ "PNL",
      enzyme %in% c("Endo (1,4) galactanase", "Endo (1,6) galactanase", "Endo (1,3) galactanase") ~ "endo-Gal",
      enzyme %in% c("β-galactosidase") ~ "\u03b2-Gal",
      enzyme %in% c("Endoarabinanase") ~ "endo-A",
      enzyme %in% c("α-L arabinofuranosidase") ~ "AF",
      enzyme %in% c(
        "Rhamnogalacturonan hydrolase",
        "Rhamnogalacturonan rhamnohydrolase",
        "Rhamnogalacturonan galacturonohydrolase"
      ) ~ "RgH",
      enzyme %in% c(
        "Rhamnogalacturonan endolyase",
        "Rhamnogalacturonan exolyase"
      ) ~ "RgL",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    KO_label = KO,
    KO_id    = make.unique(KO_label),
    gl_i     = row_number()
  )

# Custom colours for enzyme groups
group_cols <- c(
  "PME"        = "#1B5E20",
  "PG"         = "royalblue4",
  "PL"         = "red3",
  "PNL"        = "slateblue",
  "endo-Gal"   = "sienna1",
  "\u03b2-Gal" = "#00838F",
  "endo-A"     = "#4E342E",
  "AF"         = "#AD1457",
  "RgH"        = "#283593",
  "RgL"        = "palegreen3",
  "Other"      = "mediumorchid"
)

# 2) Matrix to long
mat_long <- ko_genome_matrix_meso_tax %>%
  select(genome, rel_abun, any_of(unique(KOs))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(genome, rel_abun),
    names_to = "KO",
    values_to = "presence"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    KO = as.character(KO),
    presence = as.integer(presence > 0)
  )

# 3) Replicate each KO column into multiple KO instances
long <- mat_long %>%
  inner_join(ko_meta, by = "KO", relationship = "many-to-many")

# 4) Order genomes by descending rel_abun + labels
genome_order <- long %>%
  distinct(genome, rel_abun) %>%
  arrange(desc(rel_abun)) %>%
  pull(genome)

y_labs <- long %>%
  distinct(genome, rel_abun) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(genome, " (", sprintf("%.2f", rel_abun), "%)"))

long <- long %>%
  mutate(genome = factor(genome, levels = genome_order))

# KO layout
ko_layout <- long %>%
  distinct(class, enzyme, enzyme_group, KO, KO_id, KO_label, EC, gl_i) %>%
  arrange(class, gl_i, KO_id) %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  mutate(x_local = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

class_sizes <- ko_layout %>%
  count(class, name = "n_kos") %>%
  arrange(class) %>%
  mutate(offset = lag(cumsum(n_kos + 2), default = 0))

ko_layout <- ko_layout %>%
  left_join(class_sizes, by = "class") %>%
  mutate(x = offset + x_local)

# Subclass separators
sub_sep <- ko_layout %>%
  group_by(class, enzyme) %>%
  summarise(x_end = max(x), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  arrange(x_end, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(-n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(x_sep = x_end + 0.5)

# Attach x to plotting data
long <- long %>%
  left_join(
    ko_layout %>% select(class, enzyme, KO, KO_id, x),
    by = c("class", "enzyme", "KO", "KO_id")
  )

# Sum rel_abun per KO (each genome counted once per KO)
ko_rel_abun <- long %>%
  group_by(genome, KO) %>%
  summarise(
    rel_abun = first(rel_abun),
    has_ko = any(presence == 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(has_ko) %>%
  group_by(KO) %>%
  summarise(ko_rel_abun = sum(rel_abun), .groups = "drop")

# Axis labels with coloured enzyme names only
axis_df <- ko_layout %>%
  distinct(x, KO_label, KO, enzyme, enzyme_group) %>%
  left_join(ko_rel_abun, by = "KO") %>%
  mutate(
    ko_rel_abun = replace_na(ko_rel_abun, 0),
    enzyme_col = unname(group_cols[enzyme_group])
  ) %>%
  arrange(x) %>%
  mutate(
    axis_label = paste0(
      "<b><span style='color:", enzyme_col, ";'>", enzyme, "</span></b>",
      "<br><span style='font-size:10pt; line-height:1.2; color:black;'>", KO, "</span>",
      "<br><span style='font-size:10pt; line-height:1.2; color:black;'>&Sigma; rel. abun. = ",
      sprintf("%.2f%%", ko_rel_abun), "</span>"
    )
  )

p <- ggplot(long, aes(x = x, y = genome, fill = presence)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(
    data = sub_sep,
    aes(xintercept = x_sep),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    colour = "grey75"
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ class, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = axis_df$x,
    labels = axis_df$axis_label,
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = setNames(y_labs$label, y_labs$genome)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey90", high = "black", breaks = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Gene (KO)", y = "Species (rel. abun. %)", fill = "Presence") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.x.bottom = ggtext::element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 11),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 11),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey98", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "grey60", linewidth = 0.9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = "grey60"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(filename = "pectin_EC/meso_c.png", plot = p,
       width = 21, height = 12, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
